scope: Cycle 19: Bug hunt C18 (BUG-030 save_system) + feat EndRunScreen GFC wiring

bugs_found.description: _auto_setup() found MerlinStore but never wired _save_system. Saves were silently non-functional in autoload mode (all save_system guards returned early). Fixed by reading _store.save_system after store discovery.

overall_assessment: Bug hunt C18: verified 4 files. Found 1 MEDIUM bug (save_system not wired in autoload mode). HubAntre and BroceliandeForest3D GFC integration correct, project.godot autoload registered correctly. Feature: EndRunScreen now fully wired into GFC flow — scene transitions, signal wiring, auto-discovery all production-ready. Net -18 lines (simplified BroceliandeForest3D). 29 total bugs fixed across 19 cycles.
